title: Project Telos Twelfth-Wave PDE Proof-Packet Ladder Claims

claims.text: The twelfth-wave package adds a PDE proof-packet ladder around Navier-Stokes while keeping the parent Millennium problem UNVERIFIABLE.
claims.falsification: The twelfth-wave package is missing, does not name the PDE proof-packet ladder, or claims the Navier-Stokes parent problem is solved.

claims.text: The new Navier-Stokes periodic skew-symmetry packet reports a bounded_skew_symmetry_probe MATCH and Crucible assessed its three scoped claims as MATCH.
claims.falsification: The skew-symmetry run receipt is missing, the probe is not MATCH, or Crucible does not report 3 MATCH verdicts.

claims.text: The BuildLang/buildc scientific-runtime heat-equation receipt verifies as match/PASS with zero invariant violations, while the package preserves the warning-clean boundary.
claims.falsification: The buildc scientific receipt is missing, verify output does not report match/PASS/zero violations, or the package claims buildc is warning-clean.

claims.text: The twelfth-wave source-route summary records Forum routing to project-telos, an Index context-envelope MATCH, and arXiv rows demoted to SOURCE_LEAD_ONLY.
claims.falsification: The route summary is missing, Forum route differs, Index verdict differs, or arXiv metadata is promoted beyond source leads.

claims.text: The twelfth-wave content queue includes explicit do-not-post boundaries against claiming a Navier-Stokes solution, global regularity, PDE correctness from buildc, arXiv truth, new laws of physics, or warning-clean buildc output.
claims.falsification: The content queue is missing or omits those do-not-post boundaries.

claims.text: The twelfth-wave whitepaper draft defines proof-carrying PDE research packets as an evidence-ladder method, not as a solved-problem announcement.
claims.falsification: The whitepaper draft is missing, lacks an evidence-boundary statement, or announces a Navier-Stokes solution.
